title: Database Administrator I
description: Join Cisco's Infrastructure team as a Database Administrator and help manage the systems that power our networking platforms. You'll gain hands-on experience with enterprise-scale databases while working alongside senior DBAs who are passionate about performance optimization and reliability. If you love solving complex data challenges and building systems people can trust, this is your opportunity.
responsibilities: Monitor database performance and health, proactively identifying and resolving bottlenecks
Execute backup and recovery procedures, testing disaster recovery plans quarterly
Manage user access, privileges, and security policies across Oracle and PostgreSQL environments
Optimize query performance and index structures based on execution plans and workload analysis
Collaborate with application teams to understand schema requirements and design efficient databases

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or equivalent professional experience
skills: Understanding of replication, clustering, and backup technologies
certifications: Oracle Associate DBA or PostgreSQL certification (preferred)

benefits: Ongoing technical training and certification support
